post.description: Update ID to Financial Address mapping

get.description: Returns all available provider types (BANK, EMAIL_WALLET, MOBILE_WALLET)

schema.title: Response 200 Get All Providers Dfsp Providers Get

get.description: Returns a specific provider type configuration
Returns provider values (e.g., banks, branches, wallets) filtered by type and optional parent

schema.title: Response 200 Get Provider Values Dfsp Providers  Provider Type  Values Get

get.description: Returns a specific provider value by its code

get.summary: Get children of a provider value
get.description: Returns direct children of a provider value (e.g., branches of a bank)

schema.title: Response 200 Get Children Dfsp Values  Parent Id  Children Get

get.description:
Returns "pong" always, if the service is healthy.
This can also used for service health checks.

DfspProviderSchema.title: DfspProviderSchema
DfspProviderSchema.description:
Pydantic schema for DfspProvider model.

Represents a top-level provider type.

DfspProviderValueSchema.title: DfspProviderValueSchema
DfspProviderValueSchema.description:
Pydantic schema for DfspProviderValue model.

Represents a specific provider instance (e.g., a bank, branch, or wallet).
